message:
Fix AD edge cases, add constvar support to e-graph, overhaul dtype promotion, and harden LAX ops

Automatic Differentiation (fj-ad):
- Fix zeros_like() to use correct output dtype (F64 for Bool/Float inputs,
  I64 for integer inputs) instead of reusing the input tensor's dtype with
  mismatched literal types
- Guard Pow JVP rule against NaN: skip da term when tangent[0]==0 (avoids
  0^(-1) from b*a.powf(b-1)), skip db term when tangent[1]==0 (avoids ln(0)
  from a.powf(b)*a.ln())

Cache Backend (fj-cache):
- Use unique temp filenames (pid + atomic counter) for atomic cache writes to
  prevent concurrent put() calls from racing on the same .tmp file
- Clean up temp file on write failure

Conformance (fj-conformance):
- Handle NaN==NaN and same-sign infinity comparisons in approx_equal() to
  prevent false failures in conformance tests

Dispatch (fj-dispatch):
- Fix effect token ordering: always remove-then-push-back instead of
  in-place update, ensuring correct ordering for order-sensitive transforms

E-Graph (fj-egraph):
- Add constvars as symbols in jaxpr_to_egraph(), fixing missing-variable errors
- Encode booleans as "bool:0"/"bool:1" symbols instead of FjLang::Num to
  prevent bool/integer confusion during optimization
- Thread constvars through egraph_to_jaxpr() and optimize_jaxpr()
- Decode "bool:" prefix back to Literal::Bool in id_to_atom()

Partial Evaluation (fj-interpreters):
- Mark unknown constvars as residuals in partial_eval_jaxpr()
- Prune output variable list in dce_jaxpr() to only retain used outputs

LAX Operations (fj-lax):
- Add promote_dtype(lhs, rhs) with proper lattice: F64>F32>I64>I32>Bool
- Replace element-scanning infer_dtype() with promote_dtype() in all binary
  elementwise, broadcast, select, and scalar-tensor operations
- Preserve input tensor dtype through unary operations
- Determine integral reduction status from tensor.dtype, not element scanning
- Short-circuit erf_approx(0.0) to preserve signed zero
- Preserve zero in signum() for float inputs (-0.0/+0.0)
- Validate input rank <= output rank in broadcast_in_dim
- Error on rank-0 tensors in gather and scatter operations
- Use modulo instead of is_multiple_of for reshape inferred-axis validation

Ledger (fj-ledger):
- Use saturating_sub(1) in conformal predictor quantile index to prevent
  underflow panic with small datasets

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
